subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you! Glad the conference connection is leading somewhere productive.

A 30-minute call next week sounds perfect. Could you share a few time slots that work for your team? We'll confirm whichever aligns best on our end.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those directly. But once we've had our initial discussion and mapped out the collaboration scope, we can arrange the right senior-level introductions from here.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
